title: Grappling Hook Mod: Skybound
description: Grapple onto Create contraptions, Sable airships, and everything in between. Classic grappling hook physics, modernized for Fabric & NeoForge 1.21.1+
body:
[![GrappleMod: Skybound banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/weaversworkshop/grapplemod-skybound/1.21.1-release/docs/media/grapplemod-skybound-banner.png)](https://github.com/weaversworkshop/grapplemod-skybound)

[![Minecraft Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-v1.21.1-blue?style=flat-square)](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us)
[![Fabric Loader Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric_Loader-v0.16.14-AA8554?style=flat-square)](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)
[![NeoForge Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/NeoForge-v21.1.0+-F19022?style=flat-square)](https://neoforged.net/)
[![YACL Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/YACL-v3.8.2-pink?style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
[![Mod Menu Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod_Menu-v11.0.1-indigo?style=flat-square)](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
[![GPL-3.0](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GNU_GPL_3.0-mint?style=flat-square)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.en.html)

---

Skybound is a grappling hook mod that works on **moving objects**. Throw a hook at a Create contraption, a Sable airship, or just a vanilla wall. The rope tracks it, wraps around it, and doesn't fall apart when the world moves under you.

Runs on both **Fabric** and **NeoForge** (1.21.1).

It's a fork of [grapplemod-restitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/grappling-hook-mod-fabric), itself a Fabric port of [Yyon's Grappling Hook Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/grappling-hook-mod).


## Why this fork exists

1. **Moving structures actually work.** Grapple onto a flying Create Aeronautics airship, a Sable sublevel, or an assembled Create contraption. The rope tracks position, rotation, and sublevel splits.
2. **Multiplayer is stable.** All hook and rope state lives on the server, so other players see what you see and nothing desyncs. Hooks survive a relog, too.

## What's in the box

- The classic Grappling Hook, with upgrades for motors, rockets, ender teleports, magnets, dual hooks, forcefields, and rope styles.
- **Long Fall Boots** so your knees survive the descent.
- Apply upgrades at any Smithing Table.
- A few advancements, four built-in resource pack variants (classic textures, hook-only, no-enchants, classic recipes), and a `useLimitedHook` gamerule for servers that want to restrict where hooks can attach.

## Compatibility

- **Create** — grapple onto contraptions
- **Sable** — grapple onto sublevels
- **Create: Aeronautics** — rides on the Sable physics engine

## Credits

Original mod by Yyon. Fabric port by CG360 / squeeglii (grapplemod-restitched). This fork by WeaversWorkshop. Full attribution in [ATTRIBUTIONS.md](https://github.com/weaversworkshop/grapplemod-skybound/blob/1.21.1-release/ATTRIBUTIONS.md).

Found a bug? [Open an issue](https://github.com/weaversworkshop/grapplemod-skybound/issues).
